root_goal: IDEA-2 Verification Hurt 실험 — 4가지 verification mode(none/strict/lenient/adaptive) escape rate 비교 및 HarnessOS 반영

sub_goals: runner.py 호환성 수정 (task.id, test_cases, _chat signature) — DONE

history.finding: lenient=87.5% > adaptive=75% > none=strict=62.5%. strict is cost-dominated (same rate, 2x verif calls). lenient is best at near-zero cost.
